arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano reveals two-horse race for Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that there are now just two horses left in the race to sign Marcus Rashford this month. Romano says that Dortmund and Man United plan to have new contacts in the next days for Rashford, with the Germans exploring more details of a possible loan.

arts.ttl: Man Utd decide to SELL Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Man Utd have decided to sell Alejandro Garnacho to Napoli this month if their asking price is met. However, CaughtOffside are now reporting that United have made the decision to sell Garnacho in January if Napoli offer a fair price for the player.
